name: Dacia 1300
description: The first locally produced automobile by Dacia, based on the Renault 12.

name: Dacia Prima
description: A compact hatchback produced from 1970 to 1980 based on the Renault 5.

name: Dacia Nova
description: A supermini car produced from 1982 to 1994 based on the Renault 5.

name: Dacia Solenza
description: A compact MPV produced from 2005 to 2008 based on the Renault Modus.

name: Dacia Logan
description: A compact car produced since 2004 and available in various body styles.

name: Dacia Sandero
description: A supermini hatchback produced since 2008 and available in various body styles.

name: Dacia Duster
description: A compact SUV produced since 2010 and available in various body styles.

name: Dacia Logan MCV
description: A station wagon version of the Logan compact car, produced since 2013.
